# GLKTextureInfoOrigin.topLeft

**Case**

The origin of the texture is in the top-left corner.

## Declaration

```swift
case topLeft
```

## Constants

- **GLKTextureInfoOrigin.unknown**: The origin of the texture is not supported.
- **GLKTextureInfoOrigin.bottomLeft**: The origin of the texture is in the bottom-left corner.

items.description: The origin of the texture is not supported.

items.description: The origin of the texture is in the bottom-left corner.
